metadata.description: Production-ready Claude Code skills and agents for TDD workflows, research orchestration, content creation, and strategic planning

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: TDD-first development workflow with PE reviewer, test writer, planner, release manager, and story point estimator

plugins.name: research-workflow
plugins.description: Multi-agent research orchestration with fact-checking, source evaluation, and synthesis

plugins.name: writing-workflow
plugins.description: Content creation system with multi-platform publishing, infographics, and quality scoring

plugins.name: strategy-workflow
plugins.description: Strategic planning with COS orchestration, PR-FAQ generation, and buy-vs-build analysis

plugins.name: starter-pack
plugins.description: Essential agents for beginners: planner, PE reviewer, and SDE-III implementation

plugins.name: qralph
plugins.description: Full-lifecycle 14-phase multi-agent pipeline with git automation, structured telemetry, parallel early-start, 3-agent verification, and adaptive quality loops (QRALPH v6.12.1)

plugins.name: qshortcuts-core
plugins.description: Core TDD development shortcuts: QNEW, QPLAN, QCODET, QCODE, QCHECK, QCHECKF, QCHECKT

plugins.name: qshortcuts-support
plugins.description: Development support shortcuts: QUX, QDOC, QIDEA, QGIT

plugins.name: qshortcuts-ai
plugins.description: AI and architecture shortcuts: QARCH, QPROMPT, QTRANSFORM

plugins.name: qshortcuts-content
plugins.description: Content creation shortcuts: QWRITE, QPPT, QVISUAL, QINFOGRAPHIC

plugins.name: qshortcuts-learning
plugins.description: Learning and meta-skills shortcuts: QFEEDBACK, QLEARN, QCOMPACT, QSKILL

plugins.name: integrations-trello
plugins.description: Trello integration for Claude Code - create cards, manage boards, and sync with QRALPH projects

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents: code quality, error handling, test coverage, type design, comment accuracy, and code simplification

plugins.name: coe-workflow
plugins.description: Structured COE (Correction of Errors) workflow with 5-Whys root cause analysis

plugins.name: content-pipeline
plugins.description: Content production pipeline — doc stitching, hero image generation, and AI image creation with style guides

plugins.name: engagement
plugins.description: Social engagement tools — comment generation with draft review for authentic interactions

plugins.name: media-pipeline
plugins.description: Media processing pipeline — video transcription with WhisperX, audio extraction, and dependency management

plugins.name: qdesign
plugins.description: UX design pipeline for prototyping user interfaces and interaction flows

plugins.name: quality-extras
plugins.description: Extended quality review tools — deep code review with architecture and security analysis

plugins.name: writing-swarms
plugins.description: Multi-agent creative writing swarms — headline generation and soundbite crafting with scoring rubrics

plugins.name: interview-toolkit
plugins.description: Discovery call support and post-interview synthesis — structured note-taking, pain point extraction, and deliverable generation for consultants

plugins.name: ai-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Type-agnostic multi-agent review toolkit. Spawn N clean-context reviewers to evaluate any artifact against requirements. Iterative review-fix cycles with deterministic convergence.
